CryptoQualityIndicatorMetadata.description:
Metadata for crypto quality indicator findings.

Extends BaseFindingMetadata which provides:
- source: str - Source file or location where the algorithm was found
- context: dict[str, object] - Extensible context for pipeline metadata

source.description: Source file or location where the data was found
source.title: Source

context.description: Extensible context for pipeline metadata (connector_type, artifact_id, etc.)
context.title: Context

CryptoQualityIndicatorMetadata.title: CryptoQualityIndicatorMetadata

CryptoQualityIndicatorModel.description:
Crypto quality indicator finding structure.

Captures a single cryptographic algorithm usage in source code and
assigns a quality rating and polarity. Polarity is set by the pattern
matcher at construction time based on quality_rating:
    strong     → positive
    weak       → negative
    deprecated → negative

Inherits from BaseFindingModel[CryptoQualityIndicatorMetadata] which provides:
- id: str - Unique identifier (auto-generated UUID)
- evidence: list[BaseFindingEvidence] - Evidence items with context
- matched_patterns: list[PatternMatchDetail] - Patterns that matched
- metadata: CryptoQualityIndicatorMetadata - Required metadata with source
- require_review: bool | None - Whether this finding requires human review

evidence.description: Evidence items with content and timestamps for this finding
evidence.title: Evidence

matched_patterns.description: Patterns that were matched during analysis with occurrence counts
matched_patterns.title: Matched Patterns

metadata.description: Metadata with source and context information

require_review.description: Whether this finding requires human review. Only present when True.
require_review.title: Require Review

quality_rating.description: Cryptographic quality rating of the detected algorithm
quality_rating.title: Quality Rating

polarity.description: Evidence polarity derived from quality_rating: strong → positive, weak/deprecated → negative
polarity.title: Polarity

CryptoQualityIndicatorModel.title: CryptoQualityIndicatorModel

CryptoQualityIndicatorSummary.description: Summary statistics for crypto quality indicator findings.

total_findings.title: Total Findings

CryptoQualityIndicatorSummary.title: CryptoQualityIndicatorSummary

PatternMatchDetail.description:
Detail about a matched pattern including occurrence count.

This structured type replaces simple pattern strings to provide
richer information about how many times each pattern was found,
which is useful for auditing and confidence assessment.

match_count.description: Number of times this pattern matched in the content
match_count.title: Match Count

PatternMatchDetail.title: PatternMatchDetail

description:
Complete output structure for crypto_quality_indicator schema.

Represents the full wire format for crypto quality indicator results.
These indicators feed directly into SecurityEvidenceNormaliser, which
maps them to security_evidence items with polarity for gap analysis.

findings.description: List of cryptographic algorithm quality indicators found
findings.title: Findings

summary.description: Summary statistics of the crypto quality analysis

title: CryptoQualityIndicatorOutput
